title: German-Style Squid Croquettes
description: A German twist on traditional Spanish croquettes, featuring crispy squid filling.
instructions: 1. In a medium saucepan, combine 1/4 cup of water and 1/4 cup of squid ink. Bring to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes.
2. In a separate pan, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat. Add sliced squid and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
3. In a large bowl, combine cooked squid, Spanish croquette mix, and 1/4 cup of crispy fried shallots. Mix well.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together 2 eggs and 1 cup of all-purpose flour.
5. Using a spoon, drop the squid mixture into the egg wash, then coat in flour mixture to coat.
6. Heat about 1-2 inches of oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
7. When oil is hot, add the coated squid mixture and fry until golden brown and crispy.
8. Using a slotted spoon, remove the croquettes from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
9. Serve warm with squid ink sauce for dipping.
